subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance unto him who was mentioned before the Throne, that he may arise to serve his Lord through the power of His God, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise. O servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری لمن ذکر لدی العرش لیقوم علی خدمه مولاه بقوه ربه العلیم الحکیم ان یا عبد
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment
